--SUMMARY--

You wake up at you're home town called "Robloxia", to a normal morning until a strange Gmail message appears with an attachment called “ILOVEYOU.EXE.” After opening it, a digital entity named LoveBug Veeronica also know as LoveBug emerges from the computer — a corrupted, seductive virus with a TV for a head. When the Robloxian tries to delete her, she becomes enraged, pulling them through the screen and trapping them inside a digital copy of their world.

Now stuck in a pink, pixelated simulation with no escape, the Robloxian realizes it's too late — the virus didn’t want their data... she wanted them. Forever.
